ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "mic_code" TEXT /* MIC code of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Technology) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Software) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stock (e.g., North America) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the stock is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the time period */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the time period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock during the time period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock during the time period */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock during the time period */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock during the time period */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid by the stock during the time period */,
  "split" REAL /* Split factor of the stock during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio (if applicable) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the alert (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio (if applicable) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "stock_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock news record */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "stock_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock industry record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock sector record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_region" (
  "stock_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock region record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_region_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_tags" (
  "stock_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock tag record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_tags_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_scores" (
  "stock_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock score record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., sentiment, momentum) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_scores_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
